tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text: The 1.1. _________ (1.1) of the internet has brought 1.2. _________ (1.2) benefits to society, yet it has also created new dangers. Online platforms handle millions of 1.3. _________ (1.3) transactions every day, making digital security essential. Cybercriminals use increasingly 1.4. _________ (1.4) methods to trick users into revealing personal information. Protecting your 1.5. _________ (1.5) requires strong passwords and reliable 1.6. _________ (1.6) systems. The volume of content 1.7. _________ (1.7) online daily is staggering, and much of it is 1.8. _________ (1.8) from reliable sources. Many young people develop a serious social media dependency that resembles clinical addiction.
